description: A shutdown planner develops a detailed plan for a major maintenance shutdown of the entire processing plant.

nodes.task_description: Compile the full scope of work for the shutdown, including all maintenance jobs, inspections, and capital tie-ins.

expected_outcome.value: A comprehensive work list with thousands of tasks is created.

nodes.task_description: Develop a detailed, integrated schedule for all shutdown activities, identifying the critical path.

expected_outcome.value: A Gantt chart is created showing the critical path for the 10-day shutdown.

nodes.task_description: Book all necessary resources, including contractors, cranes, and specialty tools, for the planned dates.

expected_outcome.value: All required external resources are booked and confirmed.
